@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-2962-research-groupcache-as-alternative-cache-client-to-memcached",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: Research groupcache as alternative cache client to memcached",
+    "description": "Research groupcache as alternative cache client to memcached. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current thanos deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your thanos version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nhelm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working thanos installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\nI think something which would easy up Thanos deployment with cache is https://github.com/golang/groupcache This is project done my Memcached author and it's replicated in mem cache."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Research groupcache as alternative cache client to memcached",
+        "description": "My semi-working branch: https://github.com/GiedriusS/thanos/tree/experiment/groupcache_caching_bucket.\n\nSome thoughts after working on this:\n\nThere is no way to remove a group after it has been registered with groupcache without changing groupcache's code itself. This means that if we were to use\n```yaml\n2021/06/23 07:15:12 http: Accept error: accept tcp [::]:9091: accept4: too many open files; retrying in 10ms\n2021/06/23 07:15:12 http: Accept error: accept tcp [::]:9091: accept4: too many open files; retrying in 20ms\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Research groupcache as alternative cache client to memcached\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "My semi-working branch: https://github.com/GiedriusS/thanos/tree/experiment/groupcache_caching_bucket.\n\nSome thoughts after working on this:\n\nThere is no way to remove a group after it has been registered with groupcache without changing groupcache's code itself.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2021/06/23 07:15:12 http: Accept error: accept tcp [::]:9091: accept4: too many open files; retrying in 10ms\n2021/06/23 07:15:12 http: Accept error: accept tcp [::]:9091: accept4: too many open files; retrying in 20ms"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
